philosophy.notes: Notion-style text-first product UI, white/gray base, one controlled accent, no marketing-page drift.

hierarchy.notes: Each screen has a clear primary work area: folders, page tree/editor, export preview, rehearsal script, memo editor.

execution.notes: Responsive breakpoints, readable line heights, accessible labels, and syntax-checked scripts are in place.

specificity.notes: Copy, sample projects, sections, pages, exports, rehearsal controls, and memos are specific to PT Script Manager.

restraint.notes: Neutral surfaces dominate; accent is reserved for active states, status cues, and primary actions.
